label: Protection & Cleansing
description: Remedies to protect your home, ward off evil eye, and remove negative energies

remedies.title: Cinnamon Smudging
process: Stand outside your house facing inside (like you're about to enter).
Light the incense sticks or cone.
Blow out the fire and let the smoke come.
Use this smoke to smudge your entrance.
Step into your house and, moving in the clockwise direction, smudge every part of your home.
Continue until you reach the entrance again.
If the cone/stick is still burning, put it anywhere and let it burn out.
Dispose of the residue in the dustbin.

remedies.title: Cinnamon Protection Charm
remedies.purpose: Protection from Evil Eye, Psychic Attacks & Abundance
remedies.timing: When the energy feels dense, or you feel evil eye or psychic attacks
ingredients: 1 stick of cinnamon OR a small pouch of cinnamon powder
process: Hold the cinnamon in your dominant hand.
Charge it and energize it with your intention.
Keep it in pocket, wallet, tarot cards, or runes.
remedies.benefits: Helps in protection and attracting abundance.

remedies.title: Space Cleansing with Camphor & Spices
ingredients: Cinnamon powder (1 tsp) or small cinnamon piece
process: Keep the bowl in front of you.
Put the camphor in the bowl.
Add the cloves, cinnamon, and finally the sugar on top.
Stand at the entrance of your home facing inwards.
Burn the camphor.
Move inside your house and use the smoke to cleanse your house.
Stop when you reach the main entrance.
Dispose of residue in an outside dustbin. Do not bring back inside.

remedies.title: Entryway Shield
remedies.purpose: Stop Negative Energy from Entering Your Home
process: Energize the cinnamon and alum with your intention.
Mix them together in a plastic bag.
Make a very thin flat packet by sealing the open end.
Paste it behind the door mat at the entrance of your home.
Change it monthly.

remedies.title: Prosperity Steps
remedies.purpose: Positivity + Protection + Prosperity with Every Step
process: Energize the cinnamon with your intention.
Do this after your house is cleaned for the day.
Sprinkle the powder on your door mat and at the entrance.
As people walk in, they spread your desires and wishes across your home.
Clean after 24 hours.

remedies.title: Warding Evil Energies After Funeral
remedies.timing: When returning from a funeral, death procession, or grief ceremony
process: Before you enter your home, take a pinch of salt.
Throw it over your left shoulder.
remedies.benefits: Scares off any evil spirits that may be clinging to your back.

remedies.title: Altar Empowerment
process: Charge these star anise with the intention of attracting spiritual power.
Keep 1 piece of star anise on each of the 4 corners of the altar.
Change it every full moon.

remedies.title: Curse Removal
remedies.timing: Any day; excellent results on New Moon (Amavasya)
process: Scatter red pepper all around your house.
Keep it for 24 hours.
Get it cleaned.
Throw it in a public dustbin or bury it.

remedies.title: Reversing Negative Energy
process: Take the candle.
Press black peppercorns around and into the candle in no particular pattern.
Invoke any divine deity to help remove negativity and transmute it.
Charge the candle with the intention to reverse all negative energy.
Light the candle.
Meditate for 5–6 minutes visualizing negative energy moving out of your system.
Let the candle burn out completely.
Dispose of the residue in a dustbin.

remedies.title: Fortune Restoration (Family Curse)
process: Put the betel nut in the plate.
Keep this plate on the altar.
Offer it dhoop.
Smudge it.
Betel nut to be changed only once it cracks or breaks.
remedies.benefits: Brings end to bad fortune, increases positivity, and creates a positive home environment.

remedies.title: Remove Evil Eye (Nazar)
remedies.timing: Any day; excellent results post-sunset on Tuesday, Thursday, and Saturday
process: Dip your fingers into the turmeric water and color the white fabric.
Let the fabric dry completely.
Place the caraway seeds in the center of the fabric.
Fold the fabric into an amulet and sew it close.
Use the black thread to hang it around the person suffering from the evil eye.
Let them wear it for 24 hours.
Afterwards, immerse it in running water or bury it.

remedies.title: Vastu Defect Neutralizer
remedies.purpose: Neutralize Vastu Defects in Your Home
process: Count the number of bathrooms in your home.
Take the same number of glass bowls.
Fill each bowl with rock salt.
Place one bowl in each bathroom.
Change the salt whenever it changes color, shape, or texture.

remedies.title: Heavy Energy Removal
remedies.purpose: Remove Negativity & Stop It from Entering
remedies.timing: When the energy in your home feels very heavy
process: Tie the coconut inside the black cloth.
Hang it or place it near the entrance of your home.
remedies.benefits: Stops negative energy from entering and protects the home from the evil eye.

remedies.title: Space Cleansing Spray (Amethyst & Rose)
remedies.purpose: Cleanse the Space Element of Your Home, Office, or Factory
process: Put the amethyst and rose petals into the water.
Let it soak for 7 days on your altar or home temple.
After 7 days, store the water in a spray bottle.
Use this spray to cleanse the house.

remedies.title: Lifetime Home Protection
process: Put the camphor and the 5 cloves in a diya.
Place the diya outside your main door.
Light it every morning and every night.

remedies.title: Peace and Harmony Paste
remedies.purpose: Bring Peace and Harmony Within the House
process: Mix the cumin powder and oil together to create a thick paste.
Before sunrise, apply this paste to the upper side of your main door frame.

remedies.title: Boundary Protection
remedies.purpose: Protect Your Home from External Negative Influences
process: Take both seeds in equal proportions.
Mix them in a small bowl and hold it in your hand.
Stand at your main entrance.
Walking backward, sprinkle this mix all across the inner boundary/periphery of your home.
End exactly where you started.
Leave the seeds overnight.
Clean them up the next day and dispose in a public dustbin or bury them.

remedies.title: Atmospheric Cleansing (Camphor)
remedies.purpose: Ward Off Negative Energies from the Atmosphere
process: Burn the camphor in the diya.
Smudge the house with its smoke.
Start from the main door and move inside.
Move in a clockwise direction to cleanse the air, room, and space.

remedies.title: Protect Infants from Evil Eye
remedies.purpose: Protect Infants from Nightmares, Evil Spirits & Evil Eye
process: Take the peel of garlic.
Keep it under the child's pillow.
It can be wrapped in a cotton handkerchief.
Change after 7–10 days.
Burn the old peel or dispose it in a public dustbin.

remedies.title: Protection from Nightmares (Garlic & Camphor)
remedies.purpose: Protection from Nightmares, Evil Spirits & Evil Eye
process: Put camphor in the diya.
Keep cloves of garlic on it.
Burn it.
Repeat 3 times a week for best effect.

remedies.title: Road Opening & Cleansing Bath
remedies.purpose: Road Opening, Cleansing & Warding Off Negativity
process: Add the salt and garlic in your bathing water.
Use as last rinse while bathing.

remedies.title: Healing from Negative Energy Illness
remedies.purpose: Heal Illness Caused by Negative Energy
process: Peel the 5 cloves of garlic.
Take 1 garlic clove and rotate it above your head in counter clockwise direction 3 times.
Keep it aside.
Repeat the same with the other 4 cloves.
Hold them in your hand.
Go out and throw it at the closest crossroads (chauraha).
Repeat as necessary.

remedies.title: Cinnamon Shielding Spray
process: Wash pan well and fill with water.
Add all spices & herbs to the pan.
Move index finger clockwise while chanting/focusing intention.
Boil for 20-25 minutes.
Let water cool, then pour into spray bottle.
Spray on all doors, windows and glass partitions.
remedies.benefits: Creates a protective shield against negativity.

remedies.title: Star Anise Protection Spray
remedies.purpose: Ward Off Negativity & Create Protection Shield
process: Break or coarsely grind the star anise.
Add 1.5x water.
Boil for 15-20 minutes.
Cool and strain.
Fill spray bottle.
Spray daily throughout house.
remedies.benefits: Wards off negativity and creates protection shield around your house.

remedies.title: Dream Catcher Hanging
remedies.purpose: Ward off Nightmares, Improve Sleep & Attract Prosperity
process: Make a hanging using the cinnamon stick and star anise.
Hang it on window sill, door, bed side etc.

remedies.title: Protection Toran (Bandanwar)
process: String or paste the star anise in/on the thread or ribbon.
Try and not leave much space between them.
Hang it on the main entrance.
benefits: Creates a shield at the entrance

remedies.title: Protection & Abundance Potpourri
process: Fill bowl with mix of spices.
Charge with your intention.
Keep in living area.
Do not close jar or cover bowl.
Change spices as needed or once a year.

remedies.title: Cinnamon Bundle Home Shield
process: Tie sticks together.
Keep on window sill or hang above door.
Change monthly.
Throw old in public dustbin or bury.
remedies.benefits: Destroys negative energies; gives space protection; brings prosperity.

remedies.title: Keeping Unwanted People Away
process: Keep some black peppercorns in your pocket.
Also keep some black peppercorns outside your door.
remedies.benefits: Keeps unwanted people away from your home and during gatherings.

remedies.title: Aura Cleansing Pouch
process: Put all items in black pouch.
Charge with intention.
Carry with you.

remedies.title: Attracting Prosperity to Home
remedies.timing: Once a month on any auspicious day (Ekadashi, Shivratri, Holi, Diwali, Festivals, or Full Moon)
process: Using roli powder, make a swastik outside the front door.
In the center of the swastik, put the silver bowl.
Put the rice in it.
On top of the rice, keep the betel nut.
Leave it for 3-4 days and then get it cleaned.
Immerse the rest in running water or dispose with other Pooja items.

remedies.title: Resolve All Problems & Restore Harmony
remedies.purpose: Resolve All Problems & Restore Harmony at Home
process: Put the rice grains in the silver bowl.
Keep the betel nut on top of the rice.
Keep it in either the North, East, or North-East of your home.
Keep it until your problems are resolved.
Afterwards, bury the rice and the betel nut.
Wash the bowl and use as per need.

remedies.title: Protect from Accidents (Camphor & Hanuman Chalisa)
remedies.timing: Every night before sleeping, until issue is resolved
process: Light the camphor.
Read the Hanuman Chalisa.
Repeat every night until the issue is resolved.
